data.title: Pershing Square cuts Seapoint Entertainment stake by 16.6% to 4.2M shares in Q4
Jana Partners adds Markel Group, exits Fortrea
data.description:
Jana Partners added Markel Group (NYSE:MKL) in Q4, purchasing 109K shares, according to its latest 13F filing.

The activist hedge fund exited Fortrea Holdings (NASDAQ:FTRE) and Frontier Communications (FYBR), which agreed to be sold to Verizon (VZ) in September, according to the 13F filing.

Jana increased its position in Lamb Weston (LW), adding 3.7M shares, and Rapid7 (RPD).

The hedge fund decreased its stakes in Fidelity National (FIS), Wolfspeed (WOLF), cutting 1.18M shares, and Trimble (TRMB), according to the 13F filing.

data.title: Pershing Square Holdings lifts Nike stake by 15.3% to 18.77M shares in Q4
Luokung gets receipt of Nasdaq delisting notice
data.description:
• Luokung Technology (NASDAQ:LKCO) received a letter from Nasdaq Stock Market, notifying that the company is not in compliance with Nasdaq Listing Rule.
  • As a result, the Nasdaq staff has determined to deny the company’s request for continued listing on The Nasdaq Capital Market.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: MDU Resources to acquire 49% ownership interest in Badger Wind Farm
data.description:
• MDU Resources Group on Friday said its subsidiary, Montana-Dakota Utilities (NYSE:MDU), has signed a purchase agreement to acquire a 49% ownership interest in the Badger Wind Farm for $294 million.
  • The acquisition represents 122.5 MW of the project's total 250 MW generation capacity.
  • MDU previously executed a power purchase agreement (PPA) for 150 MW of the Badger Wind Farm's output last November, which included the 49% purchase option MDU has now exercised under the purchase agreement. With this ownership purchase, the capacity under the PPA will be reduced to 27.5 MW upon closing.
  • MDU +0.39% after hours to $16.8368.
  • Source: Press Release
